
# COVID‑19 Data Visualization Project
**Author:** Navnita Sharma  
**Date:** June 23, 2026


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# Set working directory (adjust path)
setwd("C:/Users/DELL/OneDrive/Documents")

# Load datasets
day_data <- read_csv("day_wise.csv")
country_data <- read_csv("country_wise_latest.csv")

# Convert Date column
day_data$Date <- as.Date(day_data$Date)
```

## Global Trend Line Chart
```{r}
ggplot(day_data, aes(x = Date, y = Confirmed)) +
  geom_line(color = "purple", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Global COVID-19 Confirmed Cases Trend",
       x = "Date", y = "Confirmed Cases") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Top 10 Countries by Confirmed Cases
```{r}
top10 <- country_data %>%
  arrange(desc(Confirmed)) %>%
  slice(1:10)

ggplot(top10, aes(x = reorder(`Country/Region`, Confirmed), 
                  y = Confirmed, fill = `Country/Region`)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Top 10 Countries by Confirmed Cases",
       x = "Country", y = "Confirmed Cases") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Deaths vs Recovered Scatter Plot
```{r}
ggplot(country_data, aes(x = Recovered, y = Deaths, color = `Country/Region`)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Deaths vs Recovered by Country",
       x = "Recovered Cases", y = "Deaths") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Stacked Bar Chart (Selected Countries)
```{r}
india_us <- country_data %>%
  filter(`Country/Region` %in% c("India", "US","China","Canada","France")) %>%
  select(`Country/Region`, Confirmed, Deaths, Recovered) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Confirmed, Deaths, Recovered),
               names_to = "Category", values_to = "Count")

ggplot(india_us, aes(x = `Country/Region`, y = Count, fill = Category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  labs(title = "COVID-19 Breakdown (Selected Countries)",
       x = "Country", y = "Cases") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Correlation Plot (Deaths vs Confirmed)
```{r}
ggplot(country_data, aes(x = Confirmed, y = Deaths)) +
  geom_point(color = "darkblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Correlation Between Confirmed Cases and Deaths",
       x = "Confirmed Cases", y = "Deaths") +
  theme_minimal()
```
```
